calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Tony Ruch, Esq. for Plaintiff:San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness Renee Scott was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Enisha Ned.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 19 Turner Terrace, San Francisco, CA 94107.
The lease is forfeited.
Back Rent and Holdover Damages - $1,321.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff. A settlement conference was not held, because the defendant did not appear.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 remains on calendar.
